mapper.select:
SELECT dr.id, dr.room_id, dr.user_id, dr.speech_content, dr.speech_time, dr.adopted_flag, dr.conflict_resolution_flag, dr.create_time,
ui.`name` AS userName, ui.images AS userImages, FROM discussion_room dr LEFT JOIN staff_info ui ON (ui.id = dr.user_id) WHERE 1 = 1 AND dr.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY dr.create_time DESC
